name: han
description: Han's skill set: self-learning skill factory + image generation suite (han-imagen engine, infographic, hand-write-pic, disassembly-diagram, slides, svg).

interface.shortDescription: Personal skill factory and image-generation workflows
interface.longDescription: Han's Codex skill collection. Ships skill-creator-plus (self-learning skill factory), han-imagen (image generation engine, OpenAI/Google), han-infographic / han-hand-write-pic / han-disassembly-diagram (infographic, sketchnote, teardown with anti-hallucination two-phase flow + self-learning), han-slides (image slide deck → PPTX/PDF), and han-svg (editable SVG diagrams).
defaultPrompt: Create a self-learning skill with a feedback loop
Split a bloated SKILL.md into on-demand files
Add self-learning to an existing skill
Generate an infographic from an article
Draw / generate an image (OpenAI or Google)
Draw a hand-drawn sketchnote knowledge card
